steps.t: Rakhatâb is located on the southern promontory of the Cape of Umbar.
A crowd gathers around a body on the ground in Rakhatâb.
A crowd gathers around a body on the ground in Rakhatâb.
The body of an aged man lies dead on the ground in Rakhatâb.
A guard has called for you to step away from the body, and glares at you with distrust.
Daxamat stands by the crowd in Rakhatâb.
Daxamat is outside Rakhatâb, waiting to hear what you learned from the Corsairs.
The coffer containing evidence taken from the victim of the murder in Rakhatâb is outside the keep, to the south-east.
You agreed to meet with your crew outside Rakhatâb on the south-eastern beach to examine the evidence you retrieved.
Sirgon is at your meeting spot outside Rakhatâb.
Daxamat has arrived at your meeting spot south-east of Rakhatâb, and you should show him the evidence you retrieved from the coffer.
